value.found_quote:
Move to datasets and eval runs when you need repeatability

Once you know what "good" looks like, move from individual traces to repeatable datasets and eval runs. This is the right step when you want to benchmark changes, compare prompts, or run larger-scale evaluations over time.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes "Datasets and eval runs" as an offering under OpenAI Platform's evaluation tools, and the description on the page directly matches the claim's language almost verbatim: it says this feature provides "repeatable datasets and eval runs" that are the right step "when you want to benchmark changes, compare prompts, or run larger-scale evaluations over time." The page presents this as a currently available, active feature with no indication of preview or deprecation status.
